channel.title: Dropper on Blog.Yahya
channel.description: Recent content in Dropper on Blog.Yahya

item.title: WannaCry Challenge
item.description: Hey everyone! This challenge marks the end of the PMAT course challenges. I honestly learned a lot from this challenge, especially from the infamous WannaCry ransomware. I hope you learn as much as I did from this challenge! let’s get started Challenge Link 1. Record any observed symptoms of infection from initial detonation. What are the main symptoms of a WannaCry infection? Well the obvious symptom that the files on the harddisk start to have a .
